description: ft mm km fiEXHJS OF LIBERTY SATURDAY SEPTEMBER IB 1811 TI1E VERMILION CONGREGATIONAL CIIURCII The following resolutions were passed in the Congregational Church at Lowell Illinois August 14 184K 1 Resolved That in the judgment of this church slavery is an evil both moral and physi cal evil in its nature and in all its various in fluences and that its existence in our land espe cially in the Church of Christ is deeply to be de plored and firmly to be condemned 2 Resolved That we regard those churches who practice and countenance this evil as com mitting a great and heinous sin both against God against nature and against their fellow men and that we in common with all who bear the Christian name ought to set our faces against this abomination and to do all that in us lies in observance with the principles of Gods truth to convince them of their error and to abolish this nefarious sin from our land and world 3 Resolved That in doing this we are bound carefully to see to it that we are governed by the pure principles of the Gospel 4 Resolved That as a church wc regard
